LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF BUSINESS COMMUNICATORS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT. MORE SPECIFICITY REQUIRED REGARDING CONTRACT (EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT? WHISTLE BLOWER POLICY A CONTRACT?) AND PROVISIONS OF BREACH. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF PUBLIC POLICY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF BUSINESS COMMUNICATORS MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, per moving party. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF BUSINESS COMMUNICATORS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend the second cause of action for breach of contract. More specificity required regarding contract (employment contract? Whistle blower policy a contract?) and provisions of breach. Demurrer overruled as to third cause of action for violation of public policy. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/JW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
